    accept(A, B, C) - Method in interface com.sebastiandorata.musicdashboard.service.ImportService.TriConsumer

    Appends value to the tail of the list.

    Prepends value to the head of the list.
    addSongToPlaylist(Long, Song) - Method in class com.sebastiandorata.musicdashboard.service.PlaylistService
     
    album - Variable in class com.sebastiandorata.musicdashboard.dto.TopAlbumRowData
     
    Album - Class in com.sebastiandorata.musicdashboard.entity
    JPA entity representing a music album.
    Album() - Constructor for class com.sebastiandorata.musicdashboard.entity.Album
     
    AlbumArtView - Class in com.sebastiandorata.musicdashboard.presentation.shared
    Self-contained JavaFX node that displays album art for the currently playing song, falling back to a musical-note placeholder when no art is available.
    AlbumArtView(MusicPlayerService) - Constructor for class com.sebastiandorata.musicdashboard.presentation.shared.AlbumArtView
    Constructs the album art panel and wires it to the player.
    AlbumCardListCell - Class in com.sebastiandorata.musicdashboard.presentation.libraryViews
    A ListCell that renders an Album as a horizontal card row, showing a 60px album art thumbnail on the left and the album title and metadata (song count and release year) stacked on the right.
    AlbumCardListCell() - Constructor for class com.sebastiandorata.musicdashboard.presentation.libraryViews.AlbumCardListCell
    Constructs an AlbumCardListCell, initializing and arranging the artwork thumbnail, title label, and info label into a single horizontal row.
    AlbumListCell - Class in com.sebastiandorata.musicdashboard.presentation.libraryViews
    A lightweight ListCell that renders an Album as a compact two-line row showing the album title and a summary of its song count and release year.
    AlbumListCell() - Constructor for class com.sebastiandorata.musicdashboard.presentation.libraryViews.AlbumListCell
     
    AlbumRepository - Interface in com.sebastiandorata.musicdashboard.repository
    Spring Data JPA repository for Album entities.
    AlbumSongCell - Class in com.sebastiandorata.musicdashboard.presentation.libraryViews
    A ListCell used inside the album detail view to display a single Song as a tabular row containing the track number, title, play count, date first listened, and a context-menu trigger button.
    AlbumSongCell(LibraryHandler) - Constructor for class com.sebastiandorata.musicdashboard.presentation.libraryViews.AlbumSongCell
    Constructs an AlbumSongCell and builds the fixed-width column layout for track number, title, play count, date, and the menu button.
    albumTitle - Variable in class com.sebastiandorata.musicdashboard.dto.TopAlbumRowData
     
    AlbumViewBuilder - Class in com.sebastiandorata.musicdashboard.presentation.libraryViews
    Builds the full album detail view displayed when a user selects an album.
    AlbumViewBuilder(LibraryHandler, Runnable, Consumer) - Constructor for class com.sebastiandorata.musicdashboard.presentation.libraryViews.AlbumViewBuilder
    Constructs an AlbumViewBuilder.
    AlbumViewHelper - Class in com.sebastiandorata.musicdashboard.presentation.libraryViews
    Builds album list and grid views for the My Library page.
    AlbumViewHelper(MusicPlayerService, Consumer) - Constructor for class com.sebastiandorata.musicdashboard.presentation.libraryViews.AlbumViewHelper
     
    AllTimeStatsData - Class in com.sebastiandorata.musicdashboard.dto
    Data transfer object holding pre-computed all-time listening statistics for the dashboard graph info panel.
    AllTimeStatsData(Integer, Integer, Integer, Integer, Integer, Integer, Integer, boolean, boolean) - Constructor for class com.sebastiandorata.musicdashboard.dto.AllTimeStatsData
    Data transfer object carrying all-time and year-comparative listening statistics for the dashboard graph info section.
    allYears - Variable in class com.sebastiandorata.musicdashboard.dto.ChartData
     
    AlphabetBar - Class in com.sebastiandorata.musicdashboard.presentation.libraryViews
    A vertical A-Z (plus #) alphabet bar that sits on the right edge of a list view.

    Computes total listening time per artist from the current user's playback history.

    Pairs an Artist with their total accumulated listening time in seconds.
